content:
Participle Phrase

Participle Phrase ဆိုတာ Verb ကို Adjective အဖြစ် ပြောင်းပြီး နာမ်ကို ပိုရှင်းပြတဲ့ အဖွဲ့အစည်းလေးပါ။ Relative Clause ကို တိုတိုလေး ချုံ့ထားတာပါ။

Structure/Formula: Noun + Verb-ing (Active) / Verb-ed/en (Passive) + ...

👉 The boy who is playing football is my brother. → The boy playing football is my brother.

👉 The book which was written by the teacher is very interesting. → The book written by the teacher is very interesting.

👉 The girl who is singing a song on the stage is my sister. → The girl singing a song on the stage is my sister.

👉 The car which was made in Japan is quite expensive. → The car made in Japan is quite expensive.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Active meaning (လုပ်နေတယ်) ဆိုရင် Verb-ing သုံးပါ (playing, singing, running)
  • Passive meaning (လုပ်ခံရတယ်) ဆိုရင် Verb-ed/en သုံးပါ (written, made, broken)
  • who, which, that, is, was, were စတဲ့ စကားလုံးတွေကို ဖြုတ်ပစ်ရပါမယ်
  • Participle Phrase ဟာ ၎င်းရှေ့က နာမ်ကိုပဲ ချဲ့ထွင်ရှင်းပြပါတယ်

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • Passive meaning မှာ Verb-ing သုံးမိတာ (✗ The book writing by him → ✓ The book written by him)
  • Active meaning မှာ Verb-ed သုံးမိတာ (✗ The boy played football → ✓ The boy playing football)
  • Subject မတူဘဲ Participle Phrase သုံးမိတာ (Dangling Participle - ✗ Walking in the park, the flowers were beautiful)
